description: Microsoft FY2024 and FY2023 (USD millions, fiscal year ended June 30). A multi-period series: the income statement chain and the accounting equation are verified independently for each year. Retained earnings are intentionally omitted: Microsoft charges part of its large share buybacks to retained earnings, so the simple roll-forward (retained earnings = prior + net income - dividends) does not hold for it. finvariant's v0.1 roll-forward does not yet model buybacks (planned for v0.2), so to avoid a false positive this case supplies balance-sheet subtotals without the retained-earnings line.
source: Microsoft Corporation Form 10-K, fiscal years ended June 30, 2024 and June 30, 2023.
